  have h2 : f (j₂ z') = 1 ⊗ₜ z' := by simp [f, j₂]

have hN (N A : ℕ+) (z' : 𝓞^) : j₁ (((N * A : ℕ+)⁻¹ : ℚ) ⊗ₜ 1) * j₂ (A • z') = j₁ ((N⁻¹ : ℚ) ⊗ₜ 1) * j₂ z' := by
    simp only [map_smul, ← smul_mul_assoc, ← j₁.map_smul, ← j₁.map_mul, ← TensorProduct.tmul_mul,
      PNat.coe_mul, mul_comm (N : ℚ), mul_inv, ← mul_assoc, Rat.mul_inv_cancel (by exact_mod_cast A.ne_zero),
      one_mul, TensorProduct.tmul_one, j₁.map_one]
  induction z using TensorProduct.induction_on with
  | zero => exact ⟨1, 0, by simp⟩
  | add z1 z2 ih1 ih2 =>
    obtain ⟨N1, z1', rfl⟩ := ih1; obtain ⟨N2, z2', rfl⟩ := ih2
    use N1 * N2, N2 • z1' + N1 • z2'
    simp only [map_add, mul_add, hN N1 N2 z1', ← mul_comm N2 N1, hN N2 N1 z2']
  | tmul d a =>
    induction d using TensorProduct.induction_on with
    | zero => exact ⟨1, 0, by simp⟩
    | tmul q o =>
      obtain ⟨n, d, hd, hq⟩ := q.exists_rat_eq_num_denom; lift d to ℕ+ using hd

      simp [hq, ← j₂.map_smul, ← j₁.map_smul, ← smul_mul_assoc, ← j₁.map_mul,
        ← TensorProduct.tmul_mul, Rat.mul_inv_cancel (by exact_mod_cast d.ne_zero)]
      rfl
    | add d1 d2 ih1 ih2 =>
      obtain ⟨N1, z1', h1⟩ := ih1; obtain ⟨N2, z2', h2⟩ := ih2
      use N1 * N2, N2 • z1' + N1 • z2'; rw [TensorProduct.add_tmul, h1, h2]
      simp only [map_add, mul_add, hN N1 N2 z1', ← mul_comm N2 N1, hN N2 N1 z2']

have h_j (N : ℕ+) (w : 𝓞^) : j₁ ((N : ℚ)⁻¹ ⊗ₜ 1) * j₂ w = (N : ℚ)⁻¹ • j₂ w := by
    simp [j₁, j₂, Algebra.TensorProduct.assoc, TensorProduct.smul_tmul, Algebra.TensorProduct.tmul_mul_tmul]
  induction z using TensorProduct.induction_on with
  | zero => use 1, 0; simp
  | tmul d ζ =>
    induction d using TensorProduct.induction_on with
    | zero => use 1, 0; simp
    | tmul q o =>
      use ⟨q.den, q.den_pos⟩, q.num • (o ⊗ₜ ζ)
      simp [h_j, j₂, Algebra.TensorProduct.assoc, Rat.num_div_den, TensorProduct.smul_tmul, TensorProduct.tmul_smul]
    | add d1 d2 ih1 ih2 =>
      obtain ⟨N1, z1, h1⟩ := ih1; obtain ⟨N2, z2, h2⟩ := ih2
      use N1 * N2, (N2 : ℤ) • z1 + (N1 : ℤ) • z2
      simp [h_j] at h1 h2 ⊢; simp [h1, h2, smul_add, Rat.mul_inv, PNat.val_mul, mul_smul]
  | add z1 z2 ih1 ih2 =>
    obtain ⟨N1, z1, h1⟩ := ih1; obtain ⟨N2, z2, h2⟩ := ih2
    use N1 * N2, (N2 : ℤ) • z1 + (N1 : ℤ) • z2
    simp [h_j] at h1 h2 ⊢; simp [h1, h2, smul_add, Rat.mul_inv, PNat.val_mul, mul_smul]

let f := Algebra.TensorProduct.assoc ℤ ℤ ℚ 𝓞 ZHat
  have h (q : ℚ) (z' : 𝓞^) : j₁ (q ⊗ₜ 1) * j₂ z' = f.symm (q ⊗ₜ z') := by
    simp [j₁, j₂, f, AlgEquiv.toAlgHom, ← map_mul]; congr; ext; simp
  simp_rw [h]
  induction f z using TensorProduct.induction_on with
  | zero => use 1, 0; simp
  | tmul q z' =>
    use ⟨q.den, q.pos⟩, q.num • z'
    simp; congr; exact (Rat.num_div_den q).symm
  | add x y ihx ihy =>
    obtain ⟨Nx, zx, hx⟩ := ihx; obtain ⟨Ny, zy, hy⟩ := ihy
    use Nx * Ny, (Ny : ℤ) • zx + (Nx : ℤ) • zy
    rw [hx, hy, ← map_add f.symm, TensorProduct.tmul_add, ← TensorProduct.smul_tmul, ← TensorProduct.tmul_smul]
    simp [smul_smul, mul_comm]

induction z using TensorProduct.induction_on with
  | zero => exact ⟨1, 0, by simp⟩
  | t d zh =>
    induction d using TensorProduct.induction_on with
    | zero => exact ⟨1, 0, by simp⟩
    | t q o =>
      refine ⟨⟨q.den, q.pos⟩, (q.num • o) ⊗ₜ zh, ?_⟩
      simp only [j₁, j₂, AlgHom.coe_comp, Algebra.TensorProduct.includeLeft_apply,
        Algebra.TensorProduct.includeRight_apply, AlgEquiv.toAlgHom_coe,
        Algebra.TensorProduct.assoc_symm_apply, tmul_mul_tmul, one_mul, mul_one,
        ← TensorProduct.smul_tmul, smul_tmul]
      congr; field_simp; ring
    | add d1 d2 h1 h2 =>
      obtain ⟨N1, z1, rfl⟩ := h1; obtain ⟨N2, z2, rfl⟩ := h2
      refine ⟨N1 * N2, (N2 : ℤ) • z1 + (N1 : ℤ) • z2, ?_⟩
      simp only [map_add, mul_add, j₁, Algebra.TensorProduct.includeLeft_apply,
        tmul_mul_tmul, one_mul, mul_one, ← TensorProduct.smul_tmul,
        PNat.mul_coe, Nat.cast_mul, inv_mul_rev, smul_mul_assoc, ← smul_tmul, ← mul_smul]
      congr 2 <;> { field_simp; ring }
  | add z1 z2 h1 h2 =>
    obtain ⟨N1, z1, rfl⟩ := h1; obtain ⟨N2, z2, rfl⟩ := h2
    refine ⟨N1 * N2, (N2 : ℤ) • z1 + (N1 : ℤ) • z2, ?_⟩
    simp only [map_add, mul_add, j₁, Algebra.TensorProduct.includeLeft_apply,
      smul_mul_assoc, ← smul_mul_assoc, ← smul_tmul, ← mul_smul,
      PNat.mul_coe, Nat.cast_mul, inv_mul_rev]
    congr 2 <;> { field_simp; ring }

induction z using TensorProduct.induction_on with
  | zero => exact ⟨1, 0, by simp⟩
  | tprod d zH =>
    induction d using TensorProduct.induction_on with
    | zero => exact ⟨1, 0, by simp⟩
    | tprod q o =>
      use ⟨q.den, q.den_pos⟩, (q.num • o) ⊗ₜ zH
      simp [j₁, j₂, HurwitzRat, HurwitzHat, HurwitzRatHat, Rat.num_div_den,
        ← TensorProduct.smul_tmul, ← TensorProduct.tmul_smul]
    | add d1 d2 ih1 ih2 =>
      obtain ⟨n1, z1, rfl⟩ := ih1; obtain ⟨n2, z2, rfl⟩ := ih2
      use n1 * n2, n2 • z1 + n1 • z2
      simp [j₁, j₂, map_add, mul_add, ← smul_mul_assoc, ← mul_smul_comm]
  | add z1 z2 ih1 ih2 =>
    obtain ⟨n1, z1, rfl⟩ := ih1; obtain ⟨n2, z2, rfl⟩ := ih2
    use n1 * n2, n2 • z1 + n1 • z2
    simp [j₁, j₂, map_add, mul_add, ← smul_mul_assoc, ← mul_smul_comm]

have h_j (q : ℚ) (z' : 𝓞^) : j₁ (q ⊗ₜ 1) * j₂ z' = q • j₂ z' := by
    induction z' using TensorProduct.induction_on with
    | zero => simp
    | tmul o h => simp [j₁, j₂]
    | add z1 z2 ih1 ih2 => simp [mul_add, smul_add, ih1, ih2]
  induction z using TensorProduct.induction_on with
  | zero => use 1, 0; simp
  | tmul d h =>
    induction d using TensorProduct.induction_on with
    | zero => use 1, 0; simp
    | tmul q o =>
      use ⟨q.den, q.pos_den⟩, (q.num • o) ⊗ₜ h
      simp [h_j, Rat.num_div_den]
    | add d1 d2 ih1 ih2 =>
      obtain ⟨N1, z1, rfl⟩ := ih1; obtain ⟨N2, z2, rfl⟩ := ih2
      use N1 * N2, N2 • z1 + N1 • z2
      simp [h_j, smul_add, mul_smul]
      field_simp
  | add z1 z2 ih1 ih2 =>
    obtain ⟨N1, z1', rfl⟩ := ih1; obtain ⟨N2, z2', rfl⟩ := ih2
    use N1 * N2, N2 • z1' + N1 • z2'
    simp [h_j, smul_add, mul_smul]
    field_simp

let f := Algebra.TensorProduct.assoc ℤ ℤ ℚ 𝓞 ZHat
  have aux (N M : ℕ+) (w : 𝓞^) : j₁ (((N * M : ℕ)⁻¹ : ℚ) ⊗ₜ 1) * j₂ ((M : ℤ) • w) = j₁ ((N⁻¹ : ℚ) ⊗ₜ 1) * j₂ w := by
    apply f.injective
    simp only [map_mul, map_smul, j₁, j₂, f.map_one, AlgEquiv.toAlgHom_eq_coe, AlgHom.coe_coe,
      Algebra.TensorProduct.assoc_symm_apply, AlgEquiv.apply_symm_apply,
      Algebra.TensorProduct.assoc_tmul, TensorProduct.tmul_mul_tmul, mul_one, one_mul,
      ← TensorProduct.smul_tmul]
    congr; field_simp; rfl
  induction z using TensorProduct.induction_on with
  | zero => use 1, 0; simp
  | tmul d ζ =>
    induction d using TensorProduct.induction_on with
    | zero => use 1, 0; simp
    | tmul q o =>
      use ⟨q.den, q.den_pos⟩, q.num • (o ⊗ₜ ζ)
      apply f.injective
      simp only [j₁, j₂, f.map_one, map_mul, map_smul, AlgEquiv.toAlgHom_eq_coe, AlgHom.coe_coe,
        Algebra.TensorProduct.assoc_symm_apply, AlgEquiv.apply_symm_apply,
        Algebra.TensorProduct.assoc_tmul, TensorProduct.tmul_mul_tmul,
        mul_one, one_mul, ← TensorProduct.smul_tmul]
      congr; field_simp; rfl
    | add d₁ d₂ ih₁ ih₂ =>
      obtain ⟨N₁, z₁', h₁⟩ := ih₁; obtain ⟨N₂, z₂', h₂⟩ := ih₂
      use N₁ * N₂, (N₂ : ℤ) • z₁' + (N₁ : ℤ) • z₂'
      rw [map_add, mul_add, h₁, h₂, aux, mul_comm N₁, aux, mul_comm]
  | add z₁ z₂ ih₁ ih₂ =>
    obtain ⟨N₁, z₁', h₁⟩ := ih₁; obtain ⟨N₂, z₂', h₂⟩ := ih₂
    use N₁ * N₂, (N₂ : ℤ) • z₁' + (N₁ : ℤ) • z₂'
    rw [map_add, mul_add, h₁, h₂, aux, mul_comm N₁, aux, mul_comm]

let f := Algebra.TensorProduct.assoc ℤ ℤ ℚ 𝓞 ZHat
  obtain ⟨n, y, hn, h⟩ : ∃ (n : ℤ) (y : 𝓞^), n ≠ 0 ∧ n • f z = 1 ⊗ₜ y := by
    induction f z using TensorProduct.induction_on with
    | zero => use 1, 0; simp
    | tmul q o_hat => use q.den, q.num • o_hat; rw [Rat.smul_def, Rat.num_div_den]; simp
    | add x y hx hy =>
      obtain ⟨nx, yx, hnx, hyx⟩ := hx; obtain ⟨ny, yy, hny, hyy⟩ := hy
      use nx * ny, ny • yx + nx • yy
      simp [smul_add, ← hyx, ← hyy, mul_smul, smul_comm, hnx, hny]
  let N : ℕ+ := ⟨n.natAbs, Int.natAbs_pos.mpr hn⟩
  use N, (Int.sign n) • y
  apply f.injective
  rw [map_mul, j₁, j₂, Algebra.TensorProduct.includeLeft_apply]
  simp [f, ← h, N, Int.sign_mul_abs, ← Int.cast_smul ℚ, smul_smul,
    inv_mul_cancel (n : ℚ) (Int.cast_ne_zero.mpr hn)]

let f := Algebra.TensorProduct.assoc ℤ ℤ ℚ 𝓞 ZHat
  have h (w : ℚ ⊗[ℤ] 𝓞^) : ∃ (N : ℕ+) (z' : 𝓞^), w = (N : ℚ)⁻¹ ⊗ₜ[ℤ] z' := by
    induction w using TensorProduct.induction_on with
    | zero => use 1, 0; simp
    | tnm q z' =>
      use ⟨q.den, q.den_pos⟩, q.num • z'
      simp only [← TensorProduct.smul_tmul, Rat.cast_inv, Rat.cast_natCast, Rat.cast_intCast]
      congr; exact q.num_div_den.symm
    | add w₁ w₂ h₁ h₂ =>
      obtain ⟨N1, z1', rfl⟩ := h₁; obtain ⟨N2, z2', rfl⟩ := h₂
      use N1 * N2, (N2 : ℤ) • z1' + (N1 : ℤ) • z2'
      simp only [TensorProduct.add_tmul, ← TensorProduct.smul_tmul, smul_add, smul_smul, Rat.cast_mul, Rat.cast_inv, Nat.cast_mul]
      congr 1 <;> { field_simp; ring }
  obtain ⟨N, z', h_eq⟩ := h (f z)
  use N, z'
  apply f.injective
  simp [j₁, j₂, f, h_eq, TensorProduct.tmul_mul_tmul, Algebra.TensorProduct.assoc_tmul]

let f := Algebra.TensorProduct.assoc ℤ ℚ 𝓞 ZHat
  obtain ⟨N, z', h⟩ : ∃ (N : ℕ+) (z' : 𝓞^), f z = (N : ℚ)⁻¹ ⊗ₜ z' := by
    induction f z using TensorProduct.induction_on with
    | zero => use 1, 0; simp
    | tmul q z' =>
      use ⟨q.den, q.den_nz⟩, q.num • z'
      rw [TensorProduct.tmul_smul, ← Rat.num_div_den q]
      simp; field_simp
    | add w1 w2 ih1 ih2 =>
      obtain ⟨N1, z1, h1⟩ := ih1; obtain ⟨N2, z2, h2⟩ := ih2
      use N1 * N2, (N2 : ℤ) • z1 + (N1 : ℤ) • z2
      rw [h1, h2, map_add, TensorProduct.tmul_add]
      simp [TensorProduct.smul_tmul', ← TensorProduct.tmul_smul]
      congr <;> (field_simp; ring)
  use N, z'
  apply f.injective
  simp [j₁, j₂, f, h, Algebra.TensorProduct.includeLeft, Algebra.TensorProduct.includeRight]

let f := Algebra.TensorProduct.assoc ℤ ℤ ℚ 𝓞 ZHat
  obtain ⟨z', s, hz⟩ := IsLocalization.exists_tprod_mk' (nonZeroDivisors ℤ) ℚ (f z)
  let n := (s : ℤ)
  let N : ℕ+ := ⟨n.natAbs, Int.natAbs_pos.mpr (nonZeroDivisors.ne_zero s)⟩
  use N, (Int.sign n) • z'
  apply f.injective
  rw [map_mul, hz, j₁, j₂]
  simp only [AlgHom.coe_comp, AlgEquiv.toAlgHom_eq_coe, AlgEquiv.coe_coe, Function.comp_apply,
    AlgEquiv.apply_symm_apply, includeLeft_apply, Algebra.TensorProduct.assoc_tmul, includeRight_apply,
    TensorProduct.smul_tprod, ← TensorProduct.tprod_smul]
  congr
  · field_simp [n, N, Int.sign_mul_natAbs n, nonZeroDivisors.ne_zero s]
  · rw [Algebra.TensorProduct.one_def, TensorProduct.one_smul]

induction z using TensorProduct.induction_on with
  | zero => use 1, 0; simp
  | tmul d t =>
    induction d using TensorProduct.induction_on with
    | zero => use 1, 0; simp
    | tmul q o =>
      use ⟨q.den, q.den_pos⟩, q.num • (o ⊗ₜ[ℤ] t)
      simp only [j₁, j₂, AlgHom.comp_apply, Algebra.TensorProduct.includeRight_apply, AlgHom.toAlgHom_eq_coe,
        AlgEquiv.toAlgHom_coe, AlgEquiv.apply_symm_apply, ← map_smul, smul_mul_assoc,
        ← TensorProduct.smul_tmul', ← TensorProduct.tmul_mul_tmul, one_mul, Rat.num_div_den, div_eq_mul_inv]
    | add d1 d2 ih1 ih2 =>
      obtain ⟨N1, z1', h1⟩ := ih1
      obtain ⟨N2, z2', h2⟩ := ih2
      use N1 * N2, N2 • z1' + N1 • z2'
      rw [h1, h2, map_add, smul_add, mul_add, ← map_smul, smul_mul_assoc, ← mul_assoc,
          ← j₁.map_mul, ← TensorProduct.tmul_mul_tmul, one_mul, PNat.val_mul, Nat.cast_mul,
          mul_inv, inv_mul_cancel_right₀ (Nat.cast_ne_zero.mpr N2.ne_zero)]
      congr 1
      rw [mul_smul_comm, ← map_smul, ← j₁.map_mul, ← TensorProduct.tmul_mul_tmul, one_mul,
          PNat.val_mul, Nat.cast_mul, mul_inv, mul_assoc, inv_mul_cancel (Nat.cast_ne_zero.mpr N1.ne_zero), mul_one]
  | add z1 z2 ih1 ih2 =>
    obtain ⟨N1, z1', h1⟩ := ih1
    obtain ⟨N2, z2', h2⟩ := ih2
    use N1 * N2, N2 • z1' + N1 • z2'
    rw [h1, h2, map_add, smul_add, mul_add, ← map_smul, smul_mul_assoc, ← mul_assoc,
        ← j₁.map_mul, ← TensorProduct.tmul_mul_tmul, one_mul, PNat.val_mul, Nat.cast_mul,
        mul_inv, inv_mul_cancel_right₀ (Nat.cast_ne_zero.mpr N2.ne_zero)]
    congr 1
    rw [mul_smul_comm, ← map_smul, ← j₁.map_mul, ← TensorProduct.tmul_mul_tmul, one_mul,
        PNat.val_mul, Nat.cast_mul, mul_inv, mul_assoc, inv_mul_cancel (Nat.cast_ne_zero.mpr N1.ne_zero), mul_one]

let iso := Algebra.TensorProduct.assoc ℤ ℤ ℚ 𝓞 ZHat
  obtain ⟨n, z₁, hz₁⟩ := (IsLocalization.exists_smul_mem (nonZeroDivisors ℤ) (iso z) : ∃ n : nonZeroDivisors ℤ, ∃ z₁ : 𝓞^, n • iso z = 1 ⊗ₜ z₁)
  let N : ℕ+ := ⟨n.1.natAbs, Int.natAbs_pos.mpr (Set.mem_nonZeroDivisors_iff_ne_zero.mp n.2)⟩
  let z' : 𝓞^ := (if 0 < n.1 then 1 else -1 : ℤ) • z₁
  use N, z'
  apply iso.injective
  simp only [iso.map_mul, j₁, j₂, AlgEquiv.toAlgHom_eq_coe, AlgEquiv.coe_algHom,
    AlgEquiv.apply_symm_apply, Algebra.TensorProduct.includeRight_apply,
    Algebra.TensorProduct.assoc_apply, Algebra.TensorProduct.includeLeft_apply]
  rw [← hz₁, ← TensorProduct.smul_tmul, smul_smul, inv_mul_cancel (by exact_mod_cast Set.mem_nonZeroDivisors_iff_ne_zero.mp n.2), one_smul, ← TensorProduct.smul_tmul]
  simp only [z', N, PNat.coe_mk, Int.cast_natAbs]
  split_ifs with h
  · simp [h, Int.natAbs_of_nonneg (le_of_lt h)]
  · have h' : n.1 < 0 := lt_of_not_ge h
    simp [h, h', Int.natAbs_of_neg h']
    rw [← neg_smul, neg_neg]

let f := Algebra.TensorProduct.assoc ℤ ℤ ℚ 𝓞 ZHat
  obtain ⟨s, z', h⟩ := IsLocalization.exists_smul_mem_range (nonZeroDivisors ℤ) (f z)
  let n := s.val
  let N : ℕ+ := ⟨n.natAbs, Int.natAbs_pos.mpr (nonZeroDivisors.ne_zero s)⟩
  let z'' := (Int.sign n) • z'
  use N, z''
  apply f.injective
  have hNnz : (N : ℚ) ≠ 0 := by simp [N, nonZeroDivisors.ne_zero s]
  apply smul_right_injective ℚ hNnz
  simp [j₁, j₂, f, ← f.map_mul, smul_mul_assoc, ← h, ← Int.cast_smul, ← TensorProduct.smul_tmul,
    ← Int.cast_mul, Int.sign_mul_natAbs, hNnz]

have h (N : ℕ+) (z' : 𝓞^) : j₁ ((N : ℚ)⁻¹ ⊗ₜ 1) * j₂ z' = (N : ℚ)⁻¹ • j₂ z' := by
    simp [j₁, j₂, Algebra.TensorProduct.includeLeft, Algebra.TensorProduct.includeRight,
      ← TensorProduct.smul_itensor, ← TensorProduct.itensor_smul, ← TensorProduct.smul_atomic,
      smul_mul_assoc, Algebra.TensorProduct.one_def]
  induction z using TensorProduct.induction_on with
  | zero => use 1, 0; simp
  | t d zh =>
    induction d using TensorProduct.induction_on with
    | zero => use 1, 0; simp
    | t q o =>
      use ⟨q.den, q.den_pos⟩, q.num • (o ⊗ₜ zh)
      simp [h, j₂, Algebra.TensorProduct.includeRight, TensorProduct.smul_itensor,
        TensorProduct.itensor_smul, ← TensorProduct.assoc_symm_tmul]
    | add d1 d2 ih1 ih2 =>
      rcases ih1 with ⟨N1, z1, rfl⟩; rcases ih2 with ⟨N2, z2, rfl⟩
      use N1 * N2, (N2 : ℤ) • z1 + (N1 : ℤ) • z2
      simp [h, smul_add, mul_smul]
  | add x y ihx ihy =>
    rcases ihx with ⟨Nx, zx, rfl⟩; rcases ihy with ⟨Ny, zy, rfl⟩
    use Nx * Ny, (Ny : ℤ) • zx + (Nx : ℤ) • zy
    simp [h, smul_add, mul_smul]

let f := Algebra.TensorProduct.assoc ℤ ℤ ℚ 𝓞 ZHat
  obtain ⟨s, z', h⟩ := IsLocalization.exists_smul_is_map_set (nonZeroDivisors ℤ) ℚ 𝓞^ (f z)
  let n : ℕ+ := ⟨s.1.natAbs, Int.natAbs_pos.mpr s.2⟩
  use n, (s.1.sign : ℤ) • z'
  apply f.injective
  simp only [j₁, j₂, AlgHom.coe_comp, f.apply_symm_apply,
    Algebra.TensorProduct.includeRight_apply, Algebra.TensorProduct.includeLeft_apply,
    map_mul, Algebra.TensorProduct.assoc_tmul, TensorProduct.tmul_mul_tmul, one_mul, mul_one]
  rw [h, ← TensorProduct.tmul_smul, ← Int.cast_smul ℤ (s.1.sign : ℤ) z', IsLocalization.mk'_one]
  congr
  have : (s.1 : ℚ) = (s.1.sign : ℚ) * (n : ℚ) := by
    simp only [n, PNat.coe_mk, Int.cast_natAbs]
    rw [← Int.cast_mul, Int.sign_mul_natAbs]
  rw [this, mul_inv, mul_comm]
  simp [s.2]

let e := Algebra.TensorProduct.assoc ℤ ℤ ℚ 𝓞 ZHat
  obtain ⟨s, z'⟩ := IsLocalization.surjective_scalar_tensorProduct (nonZeroDivisors ℤ) ℚ 𝓞^ (e z)
  let N : ℕ+ := ⟨s.1.natAbs, Int.natAbs_pos.mpr (nonZeroDivisors.ne_zero s.2)⟩
  use N, (Int.sign s.1 : ℤ) • z'
  apply e.injective
  simp only [j₁, j₂, e, map_mul, assoc_tmul, includeLeft_apply, AlgHom.coe_comp, Function.comp_apply,
    AlgEquiv.toAlgHom_eq_coe, AlgEquiv.coe_algHom, AlgEquiv.apply_symm_apply, includeRight_apply,
    Algebra.TensorProduct.tmul_mul_tmul, one_mul, mul_one]
  rw [IsLocalization.mk'_one, ← TensorProduct.tmul_smul, TensorProduct.smul_tmul,
    SMul.smul_eq_mul, ← Int.sign_mul_natAbs s.1, Int.cast_mul, Rat.cast_coe_int, mul_inv, mul_comm]
  congr
  obtain (h|h) := Int.sign_eq_one_or_neg_one (nonZeroDivisors.ne_zero s.2) <;> simp [h]

let f := Algebra.TensorProduct.assoc ℤ ℤ ℚ 𝓞 ZHat
  obtain ⟨s, z', h⟩ := IsLocalization.surjective_scalar_mul (nonZeroDivisors ℤ) (f z)
  let N : ℕ+ := ⟨s.natAbs, Int.natAbs_pos.mpr (nonZeroDivisors.ne_zero s)⟩
  use N, s.sign • z'
  apply f.injective
  rw [h, map_mul, AlgEquiv.apply_symm_apply]
  have h1 : f (j₁ ((N : ℚ)⁻¹ ⊗ₜ 1)) = (N : ℚ)⁻¹ ⊗ₜ (1 : 𝓞^) := rfl
  have h2 : f (j₂ (s.sign • z')) = 1 ⊗ₜ (s.sign • z') := f.apply_symm_apply _
  rw [h1, h2, Algebra.TensorProduct.tmul_mul_tmul, one_mul, mul_one,
    ← TensorProduct.smul_tmul', ← TensorProduct.tmul_smul, ← Algebra.smul_def]
  congr
  have h_s : (s : ℚ) = s.sign * N := by rw [← Int.cast_mul, Int.sign_mul_natAbs, Int.cast_id]
  field_simp [h_s, nonZeroDivisors.ne_zero s]
